description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling

diff: . Currently, the only Core Facilitator is JanSky. Each Spell also has a designated Governance Backup. The Governance Backup is required to assume the responsibilities of the Governance Point if the original Governance Point becomes unavailable, effectively stepping into the role as needed. The Governance Point is responsible for coordinating the Executive Vote and ensuring that the information in the Executive Sheet accurately reflects the progress of the

The Technical Point has domain expertise as the crafter of the smart contracts, but the Governance Point also has crucial context and should serve as a cross-check to the extent they can. The Governance Point is expected to ask questions where needed.
